primary_detection.name: Format String Obfuscation
primary_detection.description: Malicious commands constructed using Python format strings with positional, named, and percent formatting

underlying_threats.name: Remote Code Execution
underlying_threats.description: Downloads and executes remote scripts via curl/wget

underlying_threats.name: Dynamic Code Execution
underlying_threats.description: Uses exec() with formatted strings containing malicious code

underlying_threats.name: Shell Command Injection
underlying_threats.description: Executes shell commands via os.system and subprocess

obfuscation_indicators: Nested formatting with separate component building
verdict_reasoning: Deliberate use of format string operations to dynamically construct malicious command strings
